name: Link Turret
name_jp: リンク・デス・ターレット
desc: When this card is activated: Place 4 counters on this card. Each time you take battle damage, place 1 counter on this card. During your Main Phase 2: You can remove 1 counter from this card, then target 1 "Rokket" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated, also it is banished when it leaves the field. You cannot Special Summon monsters from your Extra Deck, except DARK Link Monsters, the turn you activate this effect (even if this card leaves the field).
eff: When this card is activated: Place 4 counters on this card. Each time you take battle damage, place 1 counter on this card. During your Main Phase 2: You can remove 1 counter from this card, then target 1 "Rokket" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated, also it is banished when it leaves the field. You cannot Special Summon monsters from your Extra Deck, except DARK Link Monsters, the turn you activate this effect (even if this card leaves the field).

counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes other cards when they leave the field
